items.name: Item: Cards
items.instructions: Review the cards on screen. You can use the next and back buttons to see other cards.
sentences: body|Cuerpo|My body is young and strong.
require|Requerir|Will the company require you to move to Tokyo?
wait|Esperar|Let's wait to see the movie until tomorrow.
general|General|Her novels are for a general audience.
appear|Aparecer|When you see the train appear, let me know.
toward|Hacia|In the morning look toward the East to see the sun rise.
team|Equipo|The team is ready for the big game tomorrow.
easy|Fácil|I read an easy book today.
individual|Individuo| While it's important to be an individual, it is more important to be a member of society.
full|Lleno|My parents left for a couple of days and left the fridge full of food.
